recap:
- Databricks offers AI Gateway guardrails that can be enabled on serving endpoints for safety and compliance.
- AI Gateway guardrails help prevent unsafe or non-compliant content from large language models (LLMs) without requiring custom code.
- Key features include PII detection and blocking, safety filters for harmful content, usage tracking for auditing, and the ability to configure custom policies.
- Endpoint-level guardrails provide centralized control, reduce complexity, ensure consistent enforcement, and are scalable with workloads.
- Built-in guardrails include safety and PII detection, with options for defining custom unsafe categories for more specific needs.
